name: read-before-modify
description: Thoroughly read existing code before making changes. Prevents blind edits that break implicit contracts.
steps: Identify all files that will be touched by this change
Read each file completely — understand imports, exports, and callers
Map the data flow: where does input come from, where does output go
Identify implicit contracts (naming conventions, error handling patterns, return types)
Plan the change with minimal disruption to existing contracts
Make the change and verify all callers still work
